title: Aceite Finca Miles • Single-Estate EVOO Gift Packs from Baena, Córdoba
announcement: Welcome to Finca Miles! Our extra virgin olive oil is grown, harvested, and cold-pressed on our 35-hectare estate in Baena, in the Subbética hills of Córdoba, Spain. We offer Picual and Hojiblanca gift packs, single-estate tins, and harvest-edition bottles, all in elegant gift presentation. Please allow 1-2 weeks for dispatch of gift sets. International gift orders welcome across the EU, UK, and US—just message us for harvest dates or custom gift messages!
sale_message: ¡Gracias for your order! We will pack your gift set within 2-3 business days. Each batch is from a single estate, so the colour and intensity vary a little with each harvest—that is the mark of real single-estate oil. Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions!
policy_payment: We accept payments through Etsy's secure checkout including credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. For large corporate gift orders over €200, a 50% deposit is required.
policy_shipping: All gift packs ship from Baena, Córdoba via courier. Gift sets are dispatched within 7-14 business days. Ready-to-ship tins and bottles go out within 2-3 business days. Larger gift packs ship with extra padding and protective inserts to keep glass safe in transit.
policy_refunds: We want you to enjoy our oil! If a bottle arrives broken or leaking, please contact us within 48 hours with photos and we'll send a replacement or full refund. Because this is a fresh agricultural product, we cannot accept returns of opened bottles for reasons of taste preference.
